text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: More, more, more!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I need to get stronger! I'm not good enough right
now!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I need more strength!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the start of the Classic Triple Crown tour
inches closer, even more reporters have begun
visiting campus than usual.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Right now, I'm not even ready to stand on the
starting line of the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
While my legs are able to run, I must use them to
push myself even further... to achieve the highest
speeds I possibly can!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, the racers aiming for the Classics are
incredible! Yaeno's already run about a million
laps!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
For real... If I tried doing that training plan, I'd
probably end up throwing up halfway through.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
This is not enough! I cannot content myself with
this!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: They've both got plenty of drive, but...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
I don't think Mejiro Ardan will make it in time,
and I'm not sure about Yaeno Muteki, either.
That recent loss has broken her winning streak.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
It's hard to say if she'll even be eligible to run in
the Satsuki Sho. Hm... Wonder who'll be the pick
for the win.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: "My pick to win, their pick to win."

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
No matter what anyone has to say about those
two, I'm not going to stop what I'm doing.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I bet the two of them will do whatever they can to
enter the races in their best conditions, so I'll
have to do the same.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever since she reaffirmed her resolve to win the
Derby, the fire in her eyes has grown brighter with
every day the race draws closer.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: One... two... All right!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I'm ready! Let's start today's training
session!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Pile on the exercises, and don't you dare go easy
on me! Our normal regimen won't be enough!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to meet her brightly burning enthusiasm and
pay close attention to her exercises. She starts
running, but then...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ack!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I watch her sprint down the track, it seems like
her running form is completely thrown out of sorts
for a split second.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It almost looks like she's injured somewhere...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Whew... How was that, Trainer?! I've still got
plenty left in me!
choice_data_list: Are you trying to hide an injury?
Are you trying to hide an injury?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh? N-no... What makes you say that?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She avoids my gaze and draws back her right leg.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: But... Um...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sakura Chiyono O's right calf is fully taped up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Multiple strips of tape crisscross her leg to help
support the arch of her foot. I've seen this kind of
taping method in a textbook before.
choice_data_list: This is the taping method for shin splints from Athletic Injuries 101.
This is the taping method for shin splints from Athletic Injuries 101.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A shin splint is a common injury among new
athletes who increase their training volume too
suddenly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They're especially prevalent in athletes whose
muscles are still growing. Overworking their legs
and running on hard surfaces causes their muscles
and tendons to become inflamed.
choice_data_list: Have you been practicing in private?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Gulp... Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But it only hurts for a moment when I kick off the
ground! It's not even that bad, so I can bear with
it!
choice_data_list: If it worsens, you won't be able to run at all.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask her more about her injury, and it's thankfully
not a serious one. Still, I should take her to the
doctor's after this...
choice_data_list:
Looks like you'll have to take a break from
running.

Looks like you'll have to take a break from
running.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wha...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: W-wait a second! A break?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But you just saw how hard Yaeno was working and
how determined Ardan was! I-I can't...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I can't just give up on such a big race. I don't care
if it ruins my leg, I'm going to run in the—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: B-but...
choice_data_list:
No one said anything about you giving up the
race.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Trainer! Please come in! The room is over
this way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I end up asking Sakura Chiyono O's parents for
help, and we get permission to carry out her
rehabilitation at her family home.

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I do apologize for how much trouble Chiyo's
caused!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Mother
text_block_list.text: Honey! Honey! Chiyo and her trainer are here!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... That's enough, Mom! I'm gonna head in and
start training already, OK?!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Oh, dear. She's still as shy and easily embarrassed
as ever.

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, thank you so much for helping Chiyo
through this.

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I know her stubbornness is the reason you
brought her here.

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Once she sets her mind on something, she won't
let it go until she accomplishes it, for better or
worse.

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Mother
text_block_list.text:
She'll even force herself to work through
injuries—especially if there are people around
who she doesn't want to lose to.

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Mother
text_block_list.text:
It's why you took her away from school, yes? Here
at home, she can concentrate on recovering, far
removed from the racing world.

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Mother
text_block_list.text: I can't imagine the headaches she's caused you...
choice_data_list:
Well, that determination of hers is also her
strength.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Mom, stop talking Trainer's ears off! You're going
to get in the way of my rehabilitation!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, this child! Fine, fine. Thank you again,
Trainer. I hope you'll continue to support our
daughter.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
So what am I supposed to do again? Towel curls
and calf raises?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Those are completely different from my
usual exercises.
choice_data_list:
They'll help with recovery and prevent future
injuries.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Really?
choice_data_list:
Of course we'll be seeing a doctor for treatment
too.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh... Yeah, that makes sense...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But the time I spend on this isn't just for my
recovery—it's to prepare for my victory at the
Satsuki Sho and the Derby too, right?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, we focus our attention on Sakura
Chiyono O's medical treatment and training to
improve her strength.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huff! Huff!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Shuffle! Shuffle!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh... The tatami mats are all torn up. Dad's
gonna be so angry...

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! I don't think so. This is proof of how hard
you're working, after all.

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Chiyo, dear? Could you tell me about the other
racers you'll be competing against?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Uh, they're strong. They're talented, of
course, and determined too.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh! But I won't lose to them! No way!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I see. I was thinking about recording your races
on the TV and passing them out to the folks in
the neighborhood association.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wha?! That'd be so embarrassing! Just watch
them yourself! That's good enough for me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While being smothered in her mother's love,
Sakura Chiyono O pours her soul into recovery
and training.
